title: geranium sylvaticum subsp. uralense
intro: Geranium sylvaticum subsp. uralense, also known as the Ural Crane's-bill, is a plant species within the geranium genus, characterized by its distinctive flowers and leaves. The medicinal properties of Ural Crane's-bill include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce stress, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of menopause, among other uses. Herbal preparations of Ural Crane's-bill typically involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to promote overall well-being.
